stealth.name: Deep Tech Startup in Stealth Mode
stealth.context: The Origin: This project was born during an operational port meeting upon realizing that vessel weight certification (Draft Survey) is a century-old, manual process fraught with extreme financial and vital risks. I founded the startup to completely replace this process with an autonomous AI & drone workflow yielding sub-centimeter precision in seconds.
stealth.p1_desc: Architected a multi-model pipeline integrating Neural Networks (Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, Industrial OCR) to process draft marks under severe rust and wave conditions. Developed the core IP: a physics-based algorithm with mathematical transforms that autonomously reconstructs the 'True Still Water Level'. Trained the models entirely on synthetic data pipelines generated by AI.
stealth.p2_desc: Built a modular asynchronous architecture handling autonomous inspection orchestration, physical sea-state modeling, photorealistic evidentiary PDF generation, and OSINT telemetry. Implemented an 'offline-first' hybrid (Edge-Cloud) synchronization strategy and containerized the entire stack.
stealth.p3_desc: Developed the complete Transitional SPA/PWA featuring a real-time telemetry dashboard, drag-and-drop drone footage ingestion, and a digital port map—purpose-built for harsh onboard tablet environments.
stealth.p4_desc: Designed the Enterprise B2B SaaS modeling, TAM/SAM/SOM financial projections, and mapped institutional technical certifications (DNV). My key differentiator is possessing deep maritime logistics fluency combined with proven high-stress Full-Stack engineering capabilities.

rows.capabilities: Model Training for Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, Industrial OCR, Computer Vision, Synthetic Data Generation.
Statistical algorithms, noise cancellation in video feeds, temporal physical variable validation.
Asynchronous enterprise architectures, Relational ORMs, Complex Migrations, Robust REST APIs & Secure JWT APIs.
SPA Architecture / Modern Reactive Frameworks, Offline-First PWAs, i18n, Dynamic & Interactive UI/UX.
Containerization, Immutable Deployments, CI/CD Pipelines, Edge-Cloud Hybrid Architecture.
Product Strategy, Multi-year Roadmap Design, Monetization Strategies, Market Modeling (TAM/SOM).
Corporate B2B SaaS Modeling, Intellectual Property, Organizational Architecture for Pitch and Traction.

vecode.name: Vecode
vecode.context: Inheriting a Legacy System: I arrived to replace a critical monolithic operating system built in procedural flat PHP (+110 files) managing weighing scales, load orders, and inventory logistics, which suffered from unacceptable latencies.
vecode.p1_desc: Designed a modern REST API with Laravel 11. Implemented strict MVC, a robust roles/permissions system, custom Request validations, and deep abstraction using Eloquent ORM. Replaced dangerous spaghetti code with a secure, highly maintainable architecture.
vecode.p2_desc: Built the frontend as a slick Single Page Application using React 18, Vite, and Inertia.js with TailwindCSS. Implemented clean global states, completely eliminating the constant page reloads of the legacy system.
vecode.p3_desc: Eliminated the risky manual cPanel/FTP upload workflows, moving to a Local Ubuntu Server with CloudPanel. Designed a rock-solid GitHub Actions pipeline automating testing and continuous deployment on main-branch pushes, cutting operational costs and load times in half.
